untranslatable_reason: Market breadth indicators (Advanced/Declined ratio, breadth oscillators) are not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal requires explicit breadth confirmation (e.g., advancing/declining stock counts or breadth-based oscillators) which cannot be constructed from price, volume, or technical indicators provided. ADX_14 is used as a trend strength proxy, but this does not capture the true breadth confirmation requirement.
translation_notes: Signal requires market breadth data (advancing vs declining issues) which is external market-wide data not in the allowed indicator set. Substituted ADX_14 as a trend confirmation proxy, but this only confirms trend strength, not breadth confirmation. Original logic: enter long when price AND breadth both rise; enter short when price AND breadth both fall; exit when trend reverses or ADX weakens (indicating loss of directional conviction).
